message:
feat(cm): Add CLI client for procedural memory queries (bd-h1fb)

Add CLIClient to internal/cm that queries CM via cm context --json.
This enables session recovery to retrieve procedural memories without
requiring a daemon.

- NewCLIClient with configurable binary path and timeout
- GetContext for raw CM queries
- GetRecoveryContext with result limiting for context injection
- FormatForRecovery to generate markdown for agents
- Graceful degradation when CM is not installed
- Comprehensive test coverage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
